tluaNoWithStatement.tlua(2,1): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'with'.
tluaNoWithStatement.tlua(2,7): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'scope'.
tluaNoWithStatement.tlua(2,14): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
tluaNoWithStatement.tlua(3,3): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.


==== tluaNoWithStatement.tlua (4 errors) ====
    // With statements are removed, and `with` is an ordinary identifier.
    with (scope) {
    ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'with'.
          ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'scope'.
                 ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
      value;
      ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.
    }
    
    function usesWith(): number
      local with = 3
      return with
    end
